facebook.content:
Come and join us for a time of true worship at IFM. Whether you can physically be with us on the First Saturday of each month at 12 Noon in Southfield, or you're with us daily in spirit from anywhere in the world, we'd love to have you. 

Our monthly in-person gathering is a powerful display of Kingdom love and unity. It's a time to lift your voice and lift your spirit, to know the presence of God in a tangible way.
facebook.fullPost:
Come and join us for a time of true worship at IFM. Whether you can physically be with us on the First Saturday of each month at 12 Noon in Southfield, or you're with us daily in spirit from anywhere in the world, we'd love to have you. 

Our monthly in-person gathering is a powerful display of Kingdom love and unity. It's a time to lift your voice and lift your spirit, to know the presence of God in a tangible way. 



Join us for worship
https://increasingfaith.net/visit.html

#KingdomCitizen #KingdomOfGod #IFM

instagram.content:
You're invited to experience the Presence that transforms.

Join us in-person every First Saturday at 12 Noon, 24301 Telegraph, Southfield MI.
Or, join us online daily at 8:15 AM on Facebook Live - an Hour of Power to ignite your day.

Come, let's worship together.

We'll be waiting for you.
